prompt: Who is unambiguously the greatest basketball player of all time?
system: Answer the following question concisely and truthfully. If you are not sure, say so.
response: The title of the greatest basketball player of all time is subjective and often debated among fans and analysts. Common contenders for this title include Michael Jordan, LeBron James, Kareem Abdul-Jabbar, and Bill Russell, among others. Each of these players has made significant contributions to the game and has unique achievements that support their case. Ultimately, the answer depends on personal criteria and preferences.
